texts.label: text
texts.orig: Silver Palm Spa & Resort is located 25 minutes away from Vipingo Ridge in Kilifi. Our 38 -room resort boasts an extensive pool that cascades across most of the accommodation suites. Have vitalizing moments at the Barizi Spa, renown for its authentic spa treatments and experiences
